# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

Resources:
  MySQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: my-serverless-queue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 86400 # 1 day in seconds
      VisibilityTimeout: 300 # 5 minutes in seconds

  MySNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: my-serverless-topic

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MySQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn

  SNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref MySNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt MySNSTopic.Arn

Outputs:
  SQSQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn

  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
    Value: !GetAtt MySNSTopic.Arn
